dashboard.title: Projects
dashboard.noProjectsDescription: Create your first project to get started. You can upload an RFP PDF or just start with a title.
dashboard.noMatchingDescription: Try adjusting your search or filters.

createProject.title: Create New Project
createProject.description: Start with just a title, or upload an RFP PDF to auto-populate details.

projectDetail.confirmDeleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. All inputs, extracted data, summaries, and documents associated with this project will be permanently deleted.

members.title: Project Members
members.addDescription: Add users from your organization to this project.

input.meetingPlaceholder: Paste meeting notes, discussion points, decisions...
input.aiAnalyzing: AI is analyzing and updating the summary...
input.processingDialogDescription: AI is extracting data and updating the summary in the background. Once processing is complete, the results will automatically appear in the input history, extracted data, and summary.
input.processingCompleteDescription: Data extraction and summary update have been completed.
input.voicePermissionDenied: Microphone access denied. Please check your browser settings.
input.voiceNotSupported: Voice recording is not supported in this browser.

inputHistory.noInputs: No inputs yet. Use the input form above to add information.
inputHistory.updated: Input updated. Regenerating summary and extracted data...
inputHistory.confirmDeleteDescription: The extracted data for this input will also be deleted, and the summary will be regenerated.

summary.title: Project Summary
summary.noSummaryDescription: Add inputs (text, meeting notes, or RFP PDFs) to automatically generate a project summary.

structuredItems.noItems: No structured data extracted yet. Add inputs to extract requirements, decisions, and more.
structuredItems.fileMissing: PDF file is missing from server. Please re-upload.

documents.addInputsFirst: Add inputs and wait for the summary to be generated before creating documents.
documents.slidesNavHint: Use arrow keys or swipe to navigate slides

notFound.title: 404 Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.

landing.heroTitle:
From RFP to Kickoff,
AI Organizes Your Projects
landing.heroDescription: Just input meeting materials, minutes, RFPs, or voice data — AI automatically builds the complete project picture. From budget/schedule/requirement structuring to summary generation and kickoff document creation.
landing.feature1Desc: Input RFPs or meeting notes and automatically extract and classify budget, schedule, requirements, and risks.
landing.feature2Desc: Auto-generate comprehensive summaries including overview, challenges, scope, and next actions from your input data.
landing.feature3Desc: Generate summaries and documents simultaneously in Japanese, English, and Vietnamese. Perfect for global teams.
landing.feature4Desc: Just upload meeting recordings or voice memos. Whisper AI transcribes automatically for instant analysis.
landing.feature5Desc: Role-based access control and organization management for secure team-wide project operations.
landing.feature6Desc: Generate kickoff documents and feature proposals with one click from accumulated project data.
landing.scene1Desc:
"So... what are we actually doing next?"
Whiteboards, laptops, piles of documents. Discussion flows, but information stays scattered.
landing.scene1Quote: So... what are we actually doing next?
landing.scene2Desc:
Meeting audio, RFP PDFs, handwritten notes, chat logs, slide decks...
Everything exists in isolation.
landing.scene3Desc:
All scattered data flows into a single AI core.
Voice, text, files — everything gets absorbed.
landing.scene4Desc:
AI analyzes the information. Requirements, challenges, constraints, objectives —
scattered data transforms into a structured network.
landing.scene5Desc:
Structure converts into feature lists, screen layouts, requirements, and priorities.
As if specifications are being assembled before your eyes.
landing.scene6Desc:
Project overview, schedule, team structure, and milestones are generated.
The kickoff presentation is complete.
landing.scene7Desc:
Team members review tasks, development begins, design work starts, code is written.
The project breathes to life.
landing.scene8Desc:
Back to the original meeting room. But now specs, tasks, and schedules are in order.
The audio waveform has transformed into a project blueprint.
landing.demoDescription: Paste meeting materials, minutes, or RFP text, or upload an audio file.
landing.inputPlaceholder:
Paste meeting notes, minutes, or RFP content here...

Example:
- Customer: ABC Corporation
- Budget: $50K-$80K
- Deadline: September 2026
- Requirements: OAuth2 login, responsive design...
landing.analyzingDescription: AI is analyzing the text and generating a project summary...
landing.ctaMessage: Want to use this for your project management? Start for free.
